summary: Static code review PASSED for Sprint 3 Phase 2 (AI Insights BI) + Auth/Settings hardening. All 4 features verified via code analysis.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/analytics/ai-insights: Route registered at line 562 in routes.ts via analyticsAiRoutes (imported from ./routes/analytics-ai). Endpoint defined at line 18 in analytics-ai.ts with requireAnyPermission middleware.

✅ Frontend analytics.tsx: Consumes /api/analytics/ai-insights at line 390 via useQuery. Renders AI insights cards with proper data-testid attributes (analytics-ai-summary-card, analytics-ai-anomalies-card, analytics-ai-kpi-*, analytics-ai-anomaly-item-*, analytics-ai-recommendation-item-*).

✅ Auth sanitizeUser: Defined at line 36-40 in auth.ts. Destructures password out of user object. Applied in: /api/register (line 265), /api/login (line 486), /api/admin/login (line 519), /api/admin/impersonate (lines 618, 682), /api/user (line 695), /api/user/with-company (line 759).

✅ Admin settings redaction: SENSITIVE_KEY_PATTERN at line 74 matches password|secret|token|api_key|access_token|client_secret|private_key|webhook. redactSensitiveData function (lines 76-101) replaces values with '••••••••'. sanitizeSettingResponse (lines 104-111) applied to GET /api/admin/settings (line 644) and GET /api/admin/settings/:key (line 660).

success_rate.backend: 100% (static code review - all routes and security patterns verified)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (static code review - data-testid attributes and API consumption verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 Phase 2 code review complete. New /api/analytics/ai-insights endpoint is properly wired. Auth responses sanitize password via sanitizeUser(). Admin settings GET endpoints redact sensitive keys. Frontend analytics page has comprehensive data-testid coverage for AI insights cards.

auth_password_sanitization.sanitize_function: Lines 36-40: sanitizeUser destructures password from user object

admin_settings_secret_redaction.redact_function: Lines 76-101: redactSensitiveData replaces sensitive values with '••••••••'

testing_type: Static code review (backend only as requested)
